query: Draft a new local skill called my-custom-skill that handles API documentation generation.
Migrate an existing standalone skill into the host-playbook framework. It currently has its own README but no SKILL.md.
Run the benchmark suite for our skill with MiniMax M2.5 and tell me which queries are triggering the wrong skill.
Our skill trigger descriptions are too broad and causing false positives. How do we tighten the intent_tags and evaluation criteria?
Create a new skill that wraps an MCP server. What files do we need and where should they live?
Build a React component with proper accessibility attributes and keyboard navigation support.
Extract text from a scanned PDF using OCR and return per-page JSON output for Obsidian import.
Write a Bun script that renames all files in a directory by appending a sequential index prefix.
Configure Spring Security 6 with OAuth2 Resource Server and JWT validation for a new microservice.
